clusterWarnings: Fragment-pivot negation repeats across the wall aftermath and Antonidas exchange.

findings.line: Whatever answer remained no longer lived in sacks and storehouses. It hung in what came after.
findings.deletionTest: It hung in what came after.
findings.reason: KILL - the negated source falls away cleanly and the sentence still delivers the real location of the answer.
findings.suggestedFix: The answer was now in what came after.

findings.line: No neat theorem. Nothing neat remained in it. A drag in the air.
findings.reason: KILL - the negative scaffolding drops away and the concrete surviving image is the drag in the air.
findings.suggestedFix: Only a drag in the air remained.

findings.line: No gentling in it. No pity either. Direction.
findings.reason: KILL - the line stacks refusals before the committed noun and the noun survives on its own.
KILL - the positive half already carries the beat and the negated half is pure setup.

findings.line: Silence. Not absence. Him thinking in it.
findings.reason: KILL - the contrast beat is expendable once the sentence names what the silence actually contains.
findings.suggestedFix: Silence, with him thinking in it.

findings.reason: KILL - the positive statement survives intact and the refused version is dead lead-in.

findings.line: Not surprise. The shape had already been there in the road, in the unfinished logic of the plague.
findings.deletionTest: The shape had already been there in the road, in the unfinished logic of the plague.
findings.reason: KILL - the opening refusal is only a dramatic cue once the next sentence states the real reaction.
findings.suggestedFix: Recognition. The shape had already been there in the road, in the unfinished logic of the plague.

audits.dominantPattern: inanimate and abstract subjects carrying human or decisional verbs
clusterFlags: The wall aftermath stacks multiple city/image/stair agency lines in Jaina's analytical interiority.
The road section repeats geography and abstraction as active agents.

findings.line: Below her, the fires worked district by district.
findings.subject: fires
findings.realAgent: Separate fire lines and the teams managing the controlled burns.
findings.reason: KILL - the prose assigns task-like agency to the fires instead of naming the controlled burn pattern and the crews shaping it.
findings.suggestedFix: Below her, separate fire lines burned district by district.

findings.line: Stratholme had changed the air above itself.
findings.subject: Stratholme
findings.realAgent: Smoke, ash, and plague residue rising from the city.
findings.reason: KILL - the city is taking the action that belongs to its smoke and residue.
findings.suggestedFix: Smoke, ash, and residue had changed the air above Stratholme.

findings.line: The sight of them pulled her eye south again, then inward, then backward years in one sick motion.
findings.subject: sight
findings.realAgent: Jaina looking south and then following the thought back into older memories.
findings.reason: KILL - the sentence launders Jaina's attention shift through the sight and her eye instead of letting her perform it.
findings.suggestedFix: She followed them south again, then inward, then backward years in one sick motion.

findings.line: The image would not let go.
findings.pattern: pattern-5 objects wanting, refusing, or deciding
findings.subject: image
findings.realAgent: Jaina staying caught on the image.
findings.reason: KILL - the image is given grip and refusal instead of naming Jaina's inability to release it.

findings.line: It slid under every other memory and found the older ones waiting beneath it.
findings.pattern: pattern-5 objects wanting, refusing, or deciding
findings.subject: It
findings.realAgent: Jaina following the image past newer memories into older ones.
findings.reason: KILL - the image is doing the memory work that belongs to Jaina's own thought process.
findings.suggestedFix: She followed it past every other memory to the older ones beneath it.

findings.line: Her body caught the residue again, that wrong aftertaste beneath smoke, and the thought turned without asking permission.
findings.pattern: pattern-9 nominalized mental act as agent
findings.subject: thought
findings.realAgent: Jaina's mind shifting back into analysis.
findings.reason: KILL - the sentence packages Jaina's mental pivot as an autonomous thought acting on her.
findings.suggestedFix: Her body caught the residue again, that wrong aftertaste beneath smoke, and she turned back to the thought before she could stop herself.

findings.line: Yet the city had still answered.
findings.subject: city
findings.realAgent: Bodies across the city responding to the deeper activation.
findings.reason: KILL - the city is made to answer when the actual responders are the infected bodies inside it.
findings.suggestedFix: Yet bodies across the city had still answered.

findings.line: The city below offered the argument against that faith in separate fires.
findings.subject: city
findings.realAgent: The separate fires and what they demonstrated to Jaina.
findings.reason: KILL - the city is made to argue instead of the visible evidence doing that work.
findings.suggestedFix: The separate fires below were the argument against that faith.

findings.line: The stair waited where it had waited all day, cut into the inner wall, worn shallow at the center by generations of watch-boots and now streaked with soot.
findings.subject: stair
findings.realAgent: No agent; the stair simply remained in place.
findings.reason: KILL - the stair is given patience and expectancy instead of being described as present.
findings.suggestedFix: The stair was where it had been all day, cut into the inner wall, worn shallow at the center by generations of watch-boots and now streaked with soot.

findings.line: The last word sat there and offended her with its thinness.
findings.pattern: pattern-5 objects wanting, refusing, or deciding
findings.subject: word
findings.realAgent: Jaina reacting to the thinness of the word on the page.
findings.reason: KILL - the word is made to act on her instead of its thinness being named as her judgment.
findings.suggestedFix: The last word looked thin on the page.

findings.line: Practicality took the rider from them.
findings.pattern: pattern-9 nominalized mental act as agent
findings.subject: Practicality
findings.realAgent: Cyndia turning to the relay horse, the rider, and camp work.
findings.reason: KILL - an abstraction is made to carry the scene movement that belongs to the characters' actions.
findings.suggestedFix: Cyndia turned to the camp work, and the rider went with her.

findings.subject: North
findings.realAgent: Their attention and the chapter's pressure turning toward Arthas and the source question.
findings.reason: KILL - geography is made to seize what the characters are mentally handing over to it.

audits.cleanReason: Counted all seven tic families. No corner-of-mouth or marked instances appeared; tightened stayed in two physical uses below cap; look/eye beats stayed functional rather than clustering into generic gaze play; the chapter used one emotional weight metaphor and no over-cap performance dialogue tags.

summary.verdictReason: Pass A found nineteen mild kills across negation addiction and intent-smear; mild-only kills above three still fail the pass.
